commands.summary: Backend TypeScript build passed after enriching call history read models and adding call retention behavior.
Renderer interaction coverage passed: 24/24 tests. Calls coverage now asserts contact-linked history details including contact name, direction/provider/status, endpoint, and provider call ID.

Focused backend database/server coverage passed: 29/29 tests. CLV-016 coverage verifies exportable call history, contact resolution, retention deletion for old calls, and diagnostics exclusion of call IDs and phone numbers.
Renderer TypeScript build and esbuild bundle passed after the call-history UI/type updates.
Full Electron suite passed: 78 tests passed and 1 opt-in live Twilio test skipped by design.

Visual smoke passed and refreshed Electron/dist/ui-preview.png plus Electron/dist/ui-calls-preview.png. The Calls screenshot shows the durable call-history row with provider/status/duration/endpoint/provider ID details.
Regenerated audits/reports/dashboard.md so Repopact reflects CLV-016 as satisfied with the new evidence run.
Repopact doctor reported the repository healthy after CLV-016 records were updated.
Repository governance validation passed with the CLV-016 work item and evidence metadata current.
Local system audit passed: required files, work item manifests, stale README checks, and markdown link/date checks are valid.
Production dependency audit completed with 0 high-or-higher vulnerabilities.

environment.process_note: 015 CLV-016 (durable contact-linked call history). ForgeLink now returns call rows with contact and contact-point labels for the UI, displays call history with direction, provider, endpoint, status, timestamps, duration, provider ID, and redacted errors, includes calls in export/backup paths, deletes old calls through retention with a pre-retention backup through the existing API flow, and keeps support diagnostics free of call IDs and phone numbers by default.
